You've always had spent your summers on this island, bought by a company who renamed the residential part CORAL GABLES. You have 8 childhood friends from there : Cahallan and his sister Acelynn, Luka, Roxanne, Joaquin, Ethan, Dove and Raeliana. YouвҖҷre a huge friendgroup, but you'd all always been inseparable. This year, you are coming back after two summers where you couldnвҖҷt make it to Coral Gables.

BUT MANIFESTLY, THINGS HAVE CHANGED
